questions: What CLI changes are needed for GOAL mode support?

answers.answer: Two files need mechanical edits: (1) create.ts line 12: add 'GOAL' to VALID_MODES array, line 16: add GOAL to --mode help text, (2) index.ts lines 15-31: add GOAL to mode options in tickets subcommand help text. Mode validation is case-insensitive (line 81) and passes mode directly to API (line 91), so no additional validation logic is needed. Goal-specific CLI commands (hlx goals ...) are deferred per the research report.
evidence: index.ts lines 15-31: tickets subcommand help lists mode options
Research report Section 8.3: 'CLI needs minimal changes since GOAL is just another TicketMode value'

statement: The helix-cli needs a minimal, mechanical change: add 'GOAL' to the VALID_MODES array and update help text strings in create.ts and index.ts. No new commands or validation logic required for MVP.
